output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?awardLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q566 p:P166 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P166 ?award .
  ?statement pq:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "2003"))
  ?award rdfs:label ?awardLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?awardLabel) = 'en')
}
output.answer: Eminem did not receive any award in 2003. The Grammy Award for Best Rap Solo Performance for "Lose Yourself" was given in 2004 (for works released in 2003), and no other awards in 2003 were found in Wikidata.
